title: rubus horridus var. menkei
intro: Rubus horridus var. menkei, also known as the Menke's thimbleberry, is a thorny shrub that belongs to the Rosaceae family. It is native to the Himalayan region and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus horridus var. menkei include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, sore throats, and digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
